title: BNY adds USDC minting and redemption to institutional custody platform

title: Strategy unveils capital framework to preserve Bitcoin exposure, pay dividends
summary: Strategy unveils capital framework to preserve Bitcoin exposure, pay dividends
briefing: Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a capital framework allowing Bitcoin sales to fund dividends, a $2.55 billion reserve and buybacks while raising STRC payout to 12%.

summary: Vitalik Buterin says obfuscation could unlock private onchain crypto voting
briefing: Vitalik Buterin said indistinguishability obfuscation could eventually support private, collusion-resistant onchain voting without trusted committees, though the technology remains impractical.

briefing: Anthropic’s agreement makes Claude the first AI tool available to all state agencies and local governments, at half price.
